Hardware Component File

ABS - L43 Version 1.3

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ABS_X43_Version_1.3_20091119T154028.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 740
Receive ID 760
Functional Addr 01
Functional Name ABS-VDC - ABS-ESP
